raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The proposed tax on extreme wealth in California would apply to households with net worths of more than $50 million, or the top 0.1% of Californians.",
    "The proposed wealth tax is estimated to generate $21.6 billion annually.",
    "An analysis by ProPublica revealed that the richest 25 Americans pay a tiny fraction of their wealth in taxes and some pay little to nothing in income tax.",
    "California's income tax is not very effective at taxing the ultra-wealthy, as they can avoid taxes by not selling their stocks.",
    "The number of billionaires has increased by over 30% in the last year, with a new billionaire emerging roughly every 17 hours.",
    "The collective wealth of billionaires has increased by $5 trillion since the previous year.",
    "About 23,000 households would be affected by the proposed tax on the top 0.1% of the richest families in California.",
    "A poll conducted by Target Smart showed that 80% of California voters believe the ultra-rich should pay their fair share in taxes.",
    "76% of voters support implementing a tax on billionaires, and also believe state legislators have a responsibility to check the power of the ultra-wealthy."
  ]
}
```
